data_downloader: cd /lustre/work/sweeden/rogii && kaggle competitions download -c rogii-wellbore-geology-prediction -p data/ -q

kaggle_submitter: cd /lustre/work/sweeden/rogii && kaggle datasets create -p artifacts/checkpoints -r zip -m rogii-checkpoints-v1
cd /lustre/work/sweeden/rogii && kaggle datasets version -p artifacts/checkpoints -r zip -m rogii-checkpoints-v2
cd /lustre/work/sweeden/rogii && kaggle models versions create -m sweeden-ttu/rogii-wellbore-checkpoint -p artifacts/model_card -r zip
cd /lustre/work/sweeden/rogii && kaggle competitions submit -c rogii-wellbore-geology-prediction -f submission.csv -m rogii-trace -q

error_analyzer: cd /lustre/work/sweeden/rogii && python scripts/code_review_trace.py --scan-hardcoded --paths pipeline/ scripts/ hpcc/

submission_validator: cd /lustre/work/sweeden/rogii && mamba run -n kc-rogii-wellbore-geology-prediction pytest tests/ -q --tb=line 2>/dev/null || pytest tests/ -q --tb=line
